founder.name: Oskar Lind
founder.bio: Backend engineer. Building an AI coding-review assistant for small teams.

company.name: DevPilot
company.one_liner: AI code-review bot that enforces a team's own conventions from past PRs.

content.title: Show HN: DevPilot - code review that learns your team's conventions
content.author: oskarlind

content.note: Solid product, real early users, but the AI-code-review space is filling up fast. Differentiation on convention-learning is promising but unproven at scale.
